headline: Reassessing DaVita (DVA) Valuation After Strong Q4 2025 Earnings Beat And Upgraded Guidance
summary: DaVita (DVA) is back in focus after reporting a 51.8% year-over-year jump in Q4 2025 adjusted earnings per share that topped analyst expectations, along with guidance for 2026 EPS and revenue per treatment growth. See our latest analysis for DaVita. The latest earnings beat has arrived after a strong run, with DaVita’s 90 day share price return of 28.43% and year to date share price return of 31.66% contrasting with a more modest 1 year total shareholder return of 2.54%. Recent momentum has...
